mapping_area_mse_opentable.description: Mapping of Merchant Success Executive to their assigned territory and their supervisor (MSL, HoA, HoR)

columns.name: new_mse_city_sep_24
columns.description: Updated MSE city/area assignment as of September 2024. Shows territory reorganization after restructuring

columns.name: mse_name_updated
columns.description: Name of Merchant Success Executive assigned to merchant territory. Used for sales team assignment and accountability

columns.name: province
columns.description: State or province level administrative division for merchant location and geographic segmentation

columns.name: regency_city
columns.description: Regency or city name for geographic location classification and merchant territory mapping

columns.name: mse_lead
columns.description: Name of MSE Team Lead managing assigned MSE members. Shows organizational hierarchy for territory management

columns.name: head_of_area
columns.description: Name of Area Head supervising geographic area and MSE team. Top area management for performance accountability

columns.name: area
columns.description: Geographic area region classification (Java 1-3, Sumatera 1-3, etc). Used for MSE organization and sales targets

columns.name: head_of_region
columns.description: Name of Regional Head overseeing entire region. Regional management responsible for regional targets

columns.name: region
columns.description: Broad geographic region (JAVA, SUMATERA, EAST INDO). High-level geographic grouping for organizational hierarchy

columns.name: mse_join_date
columns.description: Date when the MSE joined or was assigned to this territory

ms_merchant_profiling_ssot.description: Single Source of Truth (SSOT) for merchant profiling data.Contains comprehensive merchant business details, transaction patterns, EDC/QRIS ownership.consolidated repository for all merchant profiling data across BukuWarung's sales (MSE/ RSE/ MSEE).

columns.name: phoneNumber
columns.description: Merchant's phone number without country code prefix (starting with 8). Primary key for the table.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the merchant profile was first created in the system.

columns.name: data_source_flag
columns.description: Source of merchant data: 'Prospero DB to BQ', 'Backfill BQ from Zoho', 'B2B Offline Typeform', or 'Onboard Data BW'.

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the merchant profile was last updated.

columns.name: businessName
columns.description: Name of the merchant's business (minimum 4 characters).

columns.name: ownerName
columns.description: Name of the business owner (minimum 4 characters).

columns.name: yearOfBirth
columns.description: Birth year of the business owner.

columns.name: address
columns.description: Full address of the merchant's business location.

columns.name: yearFounded
columns.description: Year when the business was established.

columns.name: shopPIC
columns.description: Person in charge (PIC) contact for the shop.

columns.name: numberOfBranches
columns.description: Number of business branches the merchant operates.

columns.name: numberOfEmployees
columns.description: Number of employees working in the business.

columns.name: surroundingArea
columns.description: Description of the area surrounding the business location.

columns.name: roadLocationType
columns.description: Type of road location where business is situated (e.g., main road, alley).

columns.name: estimatedCustomersPerDay
columns.description: Estimated number of customers visiting per day.

columns.name: totalDailyTransactions
columns.description: Total number of daily transactions across all payment methods.

columns.name: cardTransactions
columns.description: Number of card-based transactions per day.

columns.name: nonCardTransactions
columns.description: Number of non-card transactions per day.

columns.name: briCardTransactions
columns.description: Number of BRI card transactions per day.

columns.name: ppobTransactions
columns.description: Number of PPOB (bill payment) transactions per day.

columns.name: bankTransferApps
columns.description: List of bank transfer applications used by merchant.

columns.name: ppobApps
columns.description: List of PPOB applications used by merchant.

columns.name: lakuPandaiCertificate
columns.description: Whether merchant has Laku Pandai certification.

columns.name: userId
columns.description: User ID of the MSE (Merchant Success Executive) assigned to merchant's coverage area.

columns.name: businessTypes
columns.description: Array of business type classifications for the merchant.

columns.name: completedLoanDate
columns.description: Date when merchant completed their loan.

columns.name: edcOwnership
columns.description: EDC machine ownership details (comma-separated list of providers).

columns.name: loanName
columns.description: Name or type of loan the merchant has.

columns.name: loanOwnership
columns.description: Current loan ownership status of the merchant.

columns.name: ownedLoanLimit
columns.description: Maximum loan limit owned by the merchant.

columns.name: retailEventPicContact
columns.description: Contact number of the person in charge for retail.

columns.name: retailTypePoi
columns.description: Type of Point of Interest where retail operates (e.g., Perumahan, traditionalMarket, Office).

columns.name: retailCommunityName
columns.description: Name of retail community or merchant group the merchant belongs to.

columns.name: retailCommunityAffiliation
columns.description: Whether merchant is affiliated with a retail community (Yes/No).

columns.name: retailQrisOwnership
columns.description: List of QRIS platforms used by retail merchant.

columns.name: retailCreditCardPctTransaction
columns.description: Percentage of transactions made via credit card.

columns.name: retailQrisPctTransaction
columns.description: Percentage of transactions made via QRIS.

columns.name: retailContactPicPoi
columns.description: Contact number of the PIC at the Point of Interest.

columns.name: retailDebitCardPctTransaction
columns.description: Percentage of transactions made via debit card.

columns.name: retailNamePicPoi
columns.description: Name of the person in charge at the Point of Interest.

columns.name: retailPosOwnership
columns.description: List of POS systems used by the retail merchant.

columns.name: retailEstablishmentType
columns.description: Type of retail establishment (Permanent, semiPermanent, nonPermanent).

columns.name: retailLocatedInEvent
columns.description: Whether retail is located inside an event (Yes/No).

columns.name: retailLocatedInPoi
columns.description: Whether retail is located at a Point of Interest (Yes/No).

columns.name: retailEventPicName
columns.description: Name or description of event PIC or merchant notes about the event.

columns.name: retailEdcOwnership
columns.description: List of EDC machine providers used by retail merchant.

columns.name: retailOfflineDailyTransaction
columns.description: Average daily offline transaction amount in IDR.

columns.name: retailOnlineDailyTransaction
columns.description: Average daily online transaction amount in IDR.

columns.name: retailDailyQrisVolume
columns.description: Daily QRIS transaction volume in IDR.

columns.name: retailNamePoi
columns.description: Name of the Point of Interest location where retail operates.

columns.name: retailMerchantFlag
columns.description: Flag indicating if merchant is profiled for retail payment (1=Yes, 0=No). Set to 1 if retailQrisOwnership, retailEstablishmentType, or retailLocatedInEvent is not null.

columns.name: notes
columns.description: Additional notes or comments about the merchant.

columns.name: storeType
columns.description: Store type classification from retail profiling.

columns.name: businessindustry
columns.description: Business industry segment classification.

columns.name: businesslocation
columns.description: Business location type classification.

columns.name: interestedinloan
columns.description: Whether merchant expressed interest in loans.

columns.name: desiredloanlimit
columns.description: Desired loan limit amount indicated by merchant.

columns.name: mee_interested_sell_other_bw_products
columns.description: MEE: Merchant's interest in selling other BukuWarung products (comma-separated values).

columns.name: mee_average_daily_profit_payment_agent
columns.description: MEE: Average daily profit from payment agent activities (comma-separated values).

columns.name: mee_interested_build_other_business
columns.description: MEE: Whether merchant is interested in building other businesses.

columns.name: mee_total_card_transaction
columns.description: MEE: Total number of card transactions reported by merchant.

columns.name: mee_reason_why_not_use_bw_for_bri_on_us
columns.description: MEE: Reasons why merchant doesn't use BukuWarung for BRI on-us transactions (comma-separated).

columns.name: mee_edc_ownership
columns.description: MEE: EDC machine ownership details from MEE initiative (comma-separated values).

columns.name: mee_reason_why_not_use_bw_for_non_bri_card_edc_bri
columns.description: MEE: Reasons for not using BukuWarung for non-BRI card EDC transactions (comma-separated).

columns.name: mee_loan_ownership_mee
columns.description: MEE: Loan ownership status from MEE initiative perspective.

columns.name: mee_average_daily_omset_payment_agent
columns.description: MEE: Average daily turnover from payment agent activities (comma-separated values).

columns.name: mee_motivation_to_switch_bri_on_us_to_bw
columns.description: MEE: Merchant's motivation to switch BRI on-us transactions to BukuWarung (comma-separated).

columns.name: mee_current_tenor_loan
columns.description: MEE: Current loan tenor period (comma-separated values).

columns.name: mee_average_daily_profit_non_payment_agent
columns.description: MEE: Average daily profit from non-payment agent activities (comma-separated values).

columns.name: mee_current_loan_type
columns.description: MEE: Type of current loan held by merchant.

columns.name: mee_average_daily_omset_non_payment_agent
columns.description: MEE: Average daily turnover from non-payment agent activities (comma-separated values).

columns.name: mee_current_loan_interest
columns.description: MEE: Current loan interest rate (comma-separated values).

columns.name: mee_reason_why_not_use_bw_full
columns.description: MEE: Reasons why merchant doesn't use BukuWarung fully (comma-separated).

columns.name: mee_motivation_to_switch_all_edc_non_bri_to_bw
columns.description: MEE: Motivation to switch all non-BRI EDC to BukuWarung (comma-separated).

columns.name: mee_kur_loan_due
columns.description: MEE: KUR (People's Business Credit) loan due date.

columns.name: mee_bw_loan_reason_not_interested
columns.description: MEE: Reasons merchant is not interested in BukuWarung loan (comma-separated).

columns.name: mee_kur_loan_bank
columns.description: MEE: Bank providing KUR loan (comma-separated values).

columns.name: mee_kur_loan_limit
columns.description: MEE: KUR loan limit amount.

columns.name: mee_bw_loan_purpose
columns.description: MEE: Purpose for BukuWarung loan (comma-separated values).

columns.name: firstVisitBizType
columns.description: Business type classification from the first MSE visit.

columns.name: latestVisitDate
columns.description: Date of the most recent MSE visit to this merchant.

columns.name: createdDate
columns.description: Date when merchant profile was created (partition column).

columns.name: hasBRIEDC
columns.description: Flag indicating if merchant has BRI EDC machine (1=Yes, 0=No). Derived from edcOwnership field using regex.

columns.name: hasBNIEDC
columns.description: Flag indicating if merchant has BNI EDC machine (1=Yes, 0=No). Derived from edcOwnership field using regex.

columns.name: hasMandiriEDC
columns.description: Flag indicating if merchant has Mandiri EDC machine (1=Yes, 0=No). Derived from edcOwnership field using regex.

columns.name: current_mse_hor
columns.description: Head of Region (HoR) assigned to merchant's area based on regency mapping.

columns.name: current_mse_hoa
columns.description: Head of Area (HoA) assigned to merchant's area based on regency mapping.

columns.name: current_mse_lead
columns.description: MSE Lead assigned to merchant's area based on regency mapping.

columns.name: supreme_tier
columns.description: Supreme KYC tier level of the merchant (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold).

columns.name: supreme_date
columns.description: Date when merchant achieved Supreme tier status.

columns.name: hasAndroidEDC
columns.description: Flag indicating if merchant purchased Android EDC from BukuWarung (1=Yes).

columns.name: totalAndroidMachine
columns.description: Total number of Android EDC machines purchased by merchant.

columns.name: hasSakuEDC
columns.description: Flag indicating if merchant purchased Saku EDC from BukuWarung (1=Yes).

columns.name: totalSakuMachine
columns.description: Total number of Saku EDC machines purchased by merchant.

columns.name: prospero_merchant_profile_id
columns.description: Merchant profile ID from Prospero system for cross-reference.

columns.name: latest_latitude
columns.description: Latest latitude coordinate from high-quality location data (KYB prioritized, then high-quality visits).

columns.name: latest_longitude
columns.description: Latest longitude coordinate from high-quality location data (KYB prioritized, then high-quality visits).

columns.name: active_days_users_in_this_coordinate
columns.description: Description of coordinate quality: 'Supreme' for KYB data or 'Users in this coordinate for X days' for visit-based data.

columns.name: gsheet_ssot_documentation
columns.description: Google Sheets URL link to the SSOT documentation and data dictionary.

columns.name: nik
columns.description: National Identity Number (NIK) from KYC verification in Janus system.

columns.name: kyc_name
columns.description: Account name from KYC verification in Janus system.

columns.name: district
columns.description: District/Kecamatan of merchant location. Prioritizes GMaps API data, falls back to profiling data. Cleaned and standardized.

columns.name: regency
columns.description: Regency/Kabupaten of merchant location. Prioritizes GMaps API data, falls back to profiling data. Cleaned and standardized.

columns.name: province
columns.description: Province of merchant location. Prioritizes GMaps API data, falls back to profiling data. Cleaned and standardized.

columns.name: area
columns.description: Sales operational area. Prioritizes GMaps API data, falls back to profiling data. Cleaned and standardized.

columns.name: location_source
columns.description: Source of location data: '(a) District, Regency, Province and Area from GMaps API' or '(b) District, Regency, Province, and Area from Merchant Profiling'.

columns.name: visited_by_mee_flag
columns.description: Flag indicating if merchant was visited by MEE (Merchant Engagement Executive) team (1=Yes). Derived from visit records with email starting with 'mee'.
